title: Weaviate Studio Telemetry Events
description: Documentation of all telemetry events emitted by Weaviate Studio extension

sessionId.description: Ephemeral identifier for the current VS Code session

extensionVersion.description: Version of the Weaviate Studio extension

remoteName.description: Remote connection name if using remote development

hostName.description: Name of the host application (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)

queryEditor.opened.description: Emitted when the Query Editor panel is opened

extension.activated.description: Emitted when the extension is activated

extension.deactivated.description: Emitted when the extension is deactivated

extension.unhandledError.description: Emitted when an unhandled error occurs in the extension

connection.connectCompleted.description: Emitted when a connection attempt completes

dataExplorer.opened.description: Emitted when the Data Explorer panel is opened

queryEditor.queryCompleted.description: Emitted when a query execution completes

ragChat.requestCompleted.description: Emitted when a RAG request completes

collection.createCompleted.description: Emitted when a collection creation completes

backup.completed.description: Emitted when a backup create or restore operation completes

ragChat.agentModeToggled.description: Emitted when the user toggles Agent Mode on or off

ragChat.agentQuerySent.description: Emitted when a query is sent via the Query Agent

ragChat.agentQuerySuccess.description: Emitted when a Query Agent request succeeds

ragChat.agentQueryError.description: Emitted when a Query Agent request fails

ragChat.slashCommandUsed.description: Emitted when a slash command is selected from the autocomplete menu

consent: Requires VS Code telemetry to be enabled
Requires weaviate.telemetry.enabled setting to be true
Users can opt-out at any time via settings
